title: Sound Sign
description: Play sounds using signs and noteblocks!
body:
# Sound Sign

Play sounds using signs and powered noteblocks!

# How to use
Place a sign on a noteblock - it must be a wall sign - and input a sound id (you can use the first three lines for this!). on the fourth line, input the delay (in ticks) before repeating - by default this is 20 ticks/1 second. You can input `-1` to only play once per powering.

## You can also use written books!
Simularly to the sign, place a item frame on the noteblock, inside this itemframe you will want to place a written book, the contents of this book are used as the id (if there's not enough room on one page, continue writing on the next!). Input the delay when signing the book!

Once you power the noteblock, the sounds will start playing!

*please note, whilst this has only been tested in singleplayer, this should technically work on the client *or* the server. this will be updated once tested.*
